item.name: Prototype Roader Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of what appears to be cermet. Placing it near your prototype roader will bring it flailing and thrashing to life.

mount.name: Prototype Roader
mount.action: Summon forth a prototype roader, one of the fastest ways to reach your destination while scaring the seven hells out of everyone on the way.
mount.description: Salvaged from the battlegrounds of Gyr Abania and restored by goblins, this devilishly speedy─yet decidedly unwieldy─contraption is said to have a mind of its own. In this case, however, that turn of phrase may have a ring of truth to it...
mount.tooltip:
Gobbieflock does not go
looking for trouble!
Trouble comes looking
for gobbieflock! ...Honest!
- Slowfix Cointoss
